title: Salsola zeyheri
taxonomy: Salsola zeyheri is classified within the family Amaranthaceae. It belongs to the order Caryophyllales and is a member of the genus Salsola. The species is native to southern Africa. uses: Salsola zeyheri has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
